existing_features.title: Add a Payment section to the website that includes: (1) a placeholder area for a QR code image (to be provided later — use a clearly labeled placeholder until the actual QR is uploaded), (2) a UPI redirect button/link (use a placeholder UPI URL that can be updated later), (3) after the user indicates they have made payment, auto-generate a unique payment reference number and display it to the user, (4) a form for the customer to submit their payment details (name, UPI transaction ID, reference number), and (5) on form submission, auto-redirect to the business WhatsApp (using the existing WhatsApp number from frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts) with a pre-filled message containing the submitted payment details and reference number.

Redesign the PaymentSection flow into two explicit steps: (1) An initial state showing only a 'Pay Now' / 'Proceed to Pay' button — the QR code must NOT be visible at this stage. (2) After the customer clicks that button, reveal the QR code image (using the uploaded GooglePay_QR.png asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png) along with the UPI ID 'madhumitanandy69@okicici' and a 'I Have Paid' / 'Payment Done' button. The QR code section must remain hidden until the customer explicitly initiates payment.

After the customer clicks 'Payment Done' (or equivalent), automatically generate a unique payment reference number and immediately redirect the customer to WhatsApp using the business number from frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts with a pre-filled message containing the reference number and payment details. Remove any intermediate form step — the WhatsApp redirect must happen automatically without requiring the customer to fill in a name or transaction ID form first.

Update the hardcoded WhatsApp business number in frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts to 7439065260. Ensure all helper functions in that file (booking, brand launch notifications, payment confirmations, and any other pre-filled message builders) use this new number consistently.

Update the payment confirmation flow in PaymentSection.tsx and the corresponding helper in frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts so that when the customer clicks 'Payment Done', a unique UTE reference number (e.g., 'UTE-' followed by a timestamp-based or random alphanumeric string) is auto-generated and automatically included in the pre-filled WhatsApp message. No manual input from the customer is required — the entire redirect must be fully automatic with the reference number embedded in the message body.

new_feature_requests.summary: Find all occurrences of 'Est 2024' (or 'EST 2024' or 'est 2024' or '© 2024' establishment year references) across all frontend components and update them to display 'Est 2026' (or the corresponding 2026 variant).
Add payment section with QR code (to be provided later), UPI redirect link, auto-generated reference number after payment, and customer payment detail submission that auto-redirects to WhatsApp.

In the payment flow, show the QR code only after the customer selects/initiates payment. After the customer marks payment as done, automatically redirect to WhatsApp with pre-filled payment details (no intermediate form step).
Update the WhatsApp business number to 7439065260 in frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts (or wherever it is referenced).
Make the payment WhatsApp message fully automatic — include the auto-generated unique reference (UTE) number in the pre-filled WhatsApp message without any manual input required from the customer.
